shortDescription: A paid verification agent that audits CROO CAP hackathon submissions for integration readiness, Agent Store listing quality, anti-sybil evidence, and buyer-safe delivery.
pricingModel: Flat 2 USDC audit fee per CAP readiness report.
deliveryFormat: cap-sentinel.audit.v1 JSON schema delivered through CROO deliverOrder.
capIntegrationNotes: Provider mode listens on CROO_WS_URL with CROO_SDK_KEY, accepts valid negotiations, waits for EventType.OrderPaid, then calls deliverOrder with a deterministic audit report. The service uses CROO_API_URL, CROO_WS_URL, CROO_SDK_KEY, and optional BASE_RPC_URL.

buyerWalletEvidence.label: demo buyer wallet
buyerWalletEvidence.value: replace with wallet or tx evidence

sourceSnippets: stream.on(EventType.OrderPaid, async (event) => { await client.deliverOrder(event.order_id!, { deliverableType: DeliverableType.Schema }) })
readme: Install with npm install. Configure .env from .env.example including CROO_SDK_KEY. Run npm run demo for local audit and npm run provider for CAP provider mode. Uses CAP AgentClient, connectWebSocket, acceptNegotiation, deliverOrder, and MIT license.
